scripts.build:obfuscate: mkdir -p dist && javascript-obfuscator src/index.js --output dist/index.js --config obfuscator.config.json
scripts.test: node --check src/index.js && node scripts/check-admin.mjs && node scripts/check-watch-client.mjs && node scripts/check-security.mjs
scripts.deploy: npm run build:obfuscate && node scripts/run-wrangler.mjs deploy
